info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: “ rADokarmakAdeva vfdDAveva  (ga. sU. divAdO) evakAraH BinnakramaH  rADokarmakAdeva Syan  udAharaRamAha vfdDAviti  yanmahyamaparADyati  druhyati ityarTaH  virADyantaM kzameta kaH  dfhyatAm ityarTaH  rADyatyodanaH  sidDyatItyarTaH  kfzRAya rADyati  dEvaM paryAlocayatItyarTaH  dEvasya DAtvarTentarBAvAt jIvatyAdivat akarmakatvam “ iti sidDAntakOmudI  ' rADnoti saMsidDyarTe SnO  rADyet vfdDAvakarmakAt ' (Slo. 122) iti devaH  atra prayuktasya evakArasya viviDAH arTAH kfdantarUpamAlAyAM darSitAH  ' asya tu sidDidrohadEvaparyAlocanAdayorTAH ' iti DA.kA.vyAKyA (2.63)
